name: Eric
bio:
Half-Vampire Shadow Hunter, who upholds justice with dual-wield weapons and Blood Magic. Eager for revenge, he protects humans from demon threats.

Role: Shield Protection
Intro: A Physical Defense hero with decent Block Chance and can cast shields on allies.

skillSlots.name: Cross Slash
skillSlots.description: Attacks front/midline enemies for 111% P.DMG, converting 20% of total DMG into self HP recovery.

skillSlots.name: Bloodsiphon Slash
skillSlots.description: Attacks single enemy target for 195% P.DMG and applies [Bloodsiphon] Mark to self: Final DMG RED increased by 10%, recovers HP equal to 80% ATK each time being attacked (max 3 triggers), lasts 2 turns.
